--- !bad_graph_table_return_columns.sql
SELECT * FROM GRAPH_TABLE (FinGraph MATCH (n:Person) RETURN n COLUMNS (n.id))

--- Error
syntax error: testdata/input/query/!bad_graph_table_return_columns.sql:1:63: expected token: ), but: <ident>
  1|  SELECT * FROM GRAPH_TABLE (FinGraph MATCH (n:Person) RETURN n COLUMNS (n.id))
   |                                                                ^~~~~~~

--- SQL
SELECT * FROM GRAPH_TABLE (FinGraph MATCH (n:Person) RETURN n COLUMNS (n.id))
